channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Will Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Have Zombies?
item.content:encoded:
Modern Warfare 4 has been officially unveiled as the next entry in the Call of Duty franchise, and questions are already beginning to circle on whether the 2026 entry features a Zombies mode.

Zombies has become a fan-favourite mode in the Call of Duty franchise, evolving from the traditional round-based mode to an open-world extraction shooter, and has become an increasingly significant part of the most recent games.

Naturally, fans are wondering whether Zombies will return in Modern Warfare 4, and Insider Gaming has all the details.

Will Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Have Zombies?

No, Modern Warfare 4 will not feature a Zombies game mode of any sort, including a round-based option or an extraction mode, like MWZ.

Zombies has become synonymous with the Call of Duty franchise, and the past three titles have all featured Zombies content in some aspect, with the past two Black Ops titles having both round-based mode and PvE antics, while Modern Warfare 3 featured the inaugural MWZ mode.

  • More Insider Gaming: Will Modern Warfare 4 be on Game Pass?

MWZ in Modern Warfare 3 took place on a huge map, splitting zones into three areas of difficulty, and while it wasn’t for many players, it established a popular fanbase and offered a different experience after years of round-based Zombies action.

In Black Ops 6, round-based Zombies was the focus, while Black Ops 6 had the same round-based approach, alongside the open-world ‘Endgame’ mode. However, that trend comes to an end with Modern Warfare 4.

What Game Modes Will Modern Warfare 4 Have?

Modern Warfare 4 will feature the game modes everyone has come to love, with the main story, multiplayer content, Warzone, and the return of DMZ.

DMZ acts as a replacement for Zombies in Modern Warfare 4, returning to the Call of Duty franchise for the first time since Modern Warfare 2. While MWZ was somewhat of a successor to DMZ, Modern Warfare 4 returns to a more grounded reality.

  • More Insider Gaming: All Modern Warfare 4 Pre-Order Prices, Editions & Rewards

Rather than facing off against Zombies, players in DMZ will experience a PvPvE environment, with the choice of taking down AI-controlled enemies and objectives, going head-to-head with enemy players, or a mix of both.

Activision says DMZ is back and ‘bigger than ever’ in Modern Warfare 4, and more details on the mode will be revealed as the launch window edges closer.

Are you excited for Modern Warfare 4? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Modern Warfare 4, check out the details of the Prestige system, and take a look at the return of DMZ.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

https://insider-gaming.com/modern-warfare-4-zombies/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Rayman Legends Retold Price Revealed
item.content:encoded:
A reliable insider has provided the price for Rayman Legends Retold, along with some other details such as online multiplayer.

For those unaware, just a few days ago, a new logo appeared for Rayman Legends Remake, which has been titled ‘Rayman Legends Retold’. Insider Gaming’s report also confirmed that the game was scheduled for release on October 1, 2026. Now details such as price, physical edition, and more have been revealed.

Rayman Legends Retold Will Cost $40 and Will Have a Physical Edition

The latest details about Rayman Legends Retold’s price and more come from a report by billbil-kun on Dealabs. According to their information, they can also confirm the October 1, 2026, release date for all platforms and have added that the game will receive a physical edition that is exclusive to PS5 and Switch 2. Rayman Legends Retold’s price has been set as $39.99 in the United States.

The other information shared indicates that the Rayman Legends Remake is being developed by Ubisoft Montpellier, not in Milan. The game will feature an online multiplayer mode that allows 4 players to play simultaneously. The game will also come with a launch edition that includes additional bonuses.

Announcement Expected on June 2

The official announcement for the game is seemingly planned for June 2, 2026, which is also the day PlayStation will host its State of Play event. However, billbil-kun isn’t absolutely confident about this information, so players should treat it with caution. According to their information, the announcement is expected to arrive a few hours before State of Play, and they will open pre-orders at the same time.

In other news, Ubisoft has confirmed it reduced its employee count by over 1,000 over the last year. What are your thoughts on Rayman Legends Retold’s price, multiplayer, and other details? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Activision filing a trademark for Crash Bandicoot motion pitcures. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: Will Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Be On XBOX Game Pass?
item.content:encoded:
Like death and taxes, a new Call of Duty title is inevitable every year, and the 2026 edition of the franchise, Modern Warfare 4, has now been revealed, and many players are questioning the Game Pass status.

XBOX Game Pass has proven to be a solid value for money for gamers, offering day-one access to a host of titles when they launch, including many Microsoft first-party games, but some changes have been made.

If you’re wondering whether Modern Warfare 4 will be on Game Pass, or if you’ll have to shell out separately, Insider Gaming has all the important details.

Will Modern Warfare 4 be on XBOX Game Pass?

No, Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 will not be available on the XBOX Game Pass catalog at launch, though it will be added at a later date.

A host of details for Modern Warfare 4 have been released by Activision, who have made it explicitly clear that the title will not be available on Game Pass at launch.

  • More Insider Gaming: Modern Warfare 4 Cosmetics & Collabs Will Be ‘Grounded’

This is a major shift for the franchise after back-to-back Call of Duty games launching day one on the Game Pass service, following Microsoft’s takeover of Activision Blizzard, and may come as a shock for those out of the loop.

The good news, however, is that the door isn’t shut on Modern Warfare 4 being on Game Pass permanently, and the title will be added within a year of its launch.

Why Won’t Modern Warfare 4 be on XBOX Game Pass?

Microsoft changed a significant amount of details in April’s update to the XBOX Game Pass service, where it was announced that Call of Duty titles will not be available day one on the service.

Instead, games from the franchise will be added in the following year’s holiday season, around 12 months after launch. While this is still good news, Call of Duty fans will know that the franchise has a yearly release cycle, so playing solely through Game Pass will mean you will always be one entry behind.

  • More Insider Gaming: All Modern Warfare 4 Pre-Order Prices, Editions & Rewards

While XBOX did not outline the specifics behind the reasons for the change to Call of Duty titles, including the game in the service will have cost the company a significant amount of money compared to what they could have earned by selling the game to all players.

It does leave the Call of Duty franchise in a strange situation, however, as it currently stands as the only first-party Microsoft franchise not to be set for day one additions to Game Pass.

Are you excited for Modern Warfare 4? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Modern Warfare 4, check out the details of the Prestige system, and take a look at the return of DMZ.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/modern-warfare-4-game-pass/

item.title: All Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Pre-Order Prices, Editions & Rewards
item.content:encoded:
The next era of the Call of Duty franchise has been revealed with the unveiling of Modern Warfare 4, and pre-orders are available now, offering a host of additional rewards.

After back-to-back Black Ops titles, Call of Duty is returning to the Modern Warfare saga for the first time since 2023, marking the fourth entry in Activision‘s revamped Modern Warfare saga.

If you’re keen on pre-ordering the game and want all of the available details, Insider Gaming has you covered.

All Modern Warfare 4 Pre-Order Prices

Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 is available for pre-order now, with a minimum price of $69.99. However, there are ways to earn discounts.

Xbox is offering loyalty bonuses for Modern Warfare 4 on the Vault Edition, saving up to $10, but that still requires forking out a hefty asking price.

  • More Insider Gaming: Modern Warfare 4 Cosmetics & Collabs Will Be ‘Grounded’

However, with that bonus, the Vault Edition is only $20 more expensive than the Standard Edition, so passionate fans of the franchise may want to secure everything available. An upgrade to the Vault Edition is available for $30.

The table below shows all of the editions available for Modern Warfare 4, and the current prices for pre-order.

All Modern Warfare 4 Editions & Bonuses

Any player who pre-orders Modern Warfare 4 earns early access to the Open Beta, along with the Hunter Killer Operator skin.

Details of the duration and launch of the open beta are yet to be revealed, but by pre-ordering either version of Modern Warfare 4, players will secure their spot at the front of the queue.

Meanwhile, the Hunter Killer Operator skin is a pre-order reward that is available immediately, which can be used in Warzone and Black Ops 6, along with Modern Warfare 4 when it launches.

Check out the table below for all the pre-order bonuses and the editions they come with.

Are you excited for Modern Warfare 4? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Modern Warfare 4, check out the details of the Prestige system, and take a look at the return of DMZ.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/modern-warfare-4-pre-order-prices-editions-rewards/

item.title: Activision Files Trademark For Crash Bandicoot Motion Pictures
item.content:encoded:
Activision has filed a new trademark for the Crash Bandicoot franchise, and it could hint at big plans for the series outside of gaming.

The filing specifically references ‘motion picture films’ and ‘television series,’ suggesting the publisher may be exploring opportunities in film, television, or animation.

What Does Crash Bandicoot’s Future Look Like?

The new trademark for Crash Bandicoot can be viewed here or via the image above. You’ll note that it covers a broad range of entertainment uses and is valid until 2035. While trademarks don’t guarantee that a project is actively in development, they can often provide an early indication of a company’s long-term plans.

Interestingly, this isn’t the first time Crash Bandicoot has been linked to television. Late last year, rumors suggested that an animated Crash Bandicoot series was in production for Netflix, with reports claiming it was being developed by WildBrain Studios, the team behind Sonic Prime.

However, little information surfaced after the initial reports, and the project seemingly disappeared from public discussion. This latest trademark could reignite speculation that some form of adaptation is still being considered behind the scenes. After all, it would be unusual for Activision to secure such broad entertainment rights without at least exploring potential opportunities.

For now, fans can only speculate about what form a Crash Bandicoot adaptation might take. Whether it’s an animated series, a feature film, or something entirely different, the trademark suggests Activision sees the franchise as more than just a video game property.

And with the tricky marsupial making a resurgence in the gaming scene, with titles such as Crash Bandicoot 4: It’s About Time and Crash Team Racing Nitro-Fueled, the timing could be perfect for Crash to make the leap to the big screen.

What do you hope to see from Crash Bandicoot next? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about Infinity Ward’s plans for cosmetics in Modern Warfare 4, as well as everything announced during the Insider Gaming Showcase!

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Modern Warfare 4 Cosmetics & Collabs Will Be ‘Grounded’
item.content:encoded:
Modern Warfare 4 has officially been announced by Infinity Ward, and the studio is already making it clear that authenticity will be a major focus. That commitment extends beyond the campaign and gameplay, as the developer has addressed how it plans to handle cosmetics and crossover content.

The topic has become increasingly important to Call of Duty fans over the years. While celebrity operators and pop culture collaborations have become commonplace across the franchise, many players feel they can clash with the grounded military setting that Modern Warfare is known for.

Infinity Ward Will Be ‘Transparent’ With Future Collabs

In a post on X, Infinity Ward outlined its approach to cosmetics and future collaborations:

Every aspect of Modern Warfare 4 is anchored in the game’s narrative. Every feature, every decision needs to feel authentic to what Modern Warfare is, and that includes cosmetics and collabs. We’re committed to keeping it grounded and transparent, and we want to hear from you on what you’d like to see in our game.

The biggest takeaway is Infinity Ward’s promise to keep cosmetics and collaborations “grounded,” while also encouraging community feedback. Many fans have responded positively, with requests for classic operators, military-themed cosmetics, and character skins from previous Modern Warfare titles.

That said, some players remain cautious. Similar promises have been made before, only for increasingly outlandish crossover skins to arrive later in a game’s lifecycle. Characters such as Snoop Dogg, Nikki Minaj and American Dad have become common examples of when collabs have clearly crossed the line—even if they’ve sold incredibly well.

Whether Modern Warfare 4 can stick to its vision remains to be seen, but Infinity Ward’s early messaging suggests the studio is aware of community concerns. The real test will come when the game’s first crossover collaborations are revealed, likely a few weeks after launch.

How do you feel about cosmetics in Modern Warfare 4? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Modern Warfare news, check out the following:

  • New Modern Warfare 4 Campaign ‘Returns to Series’ Roots
  • Modern Warfare 4 Prestige System Offers More Freedom Than Ever Before
  • Call of Duty’s DMZ is Coming Back Bigger Than Ever in 2026

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Pokémon 30th Anniversary TCG Set to be Revealed Next Week
item.content:encoded:
The Pokémon Company has announced a special announcement video revealing that the 30th anniversary TCG set will take place on June 1, after months of waiting.

An initial teaser for the anniversary set, celebrating three decades of the Pokémon TCG, was first shown during the Pokémon Day Presents showcase at the end of February, and it’s been a few months of quietly waiting ever since.

However, official confirmation of the reveal from Pokémon Japan has highlighted when the floodgates of information will open, although some leaks have already emerged.

Pokémon TCG 30th Anniversary Set Revealed June 1st

A special announcement video will be shown on June 1st at 6 AM PT/8 AM CT/9 AM ET/2 PM BST, showcasing exactly what fans can expect, but some eye-catching details have already been shared.

Pokebeach, which correctly stated earlier this week that a full reveal of the set is coming next week, has reported that Japan’s 30th Celebration set will feature a Pikachu in every pack, with 30 total Pikachu cards to collect.

Cards will contain six cards, all of which will be foil, and are expected to showcase reprints of famous artwork and concepts from the past three decades, along with a new rarity of card that was first teased back on Pokémon Day.

The set is set to be released in Japan on Wednesday, September 16th, and will be released “simultaneously” worldwide, though the international release in the United States and United Kingdom is believed to be set for two days later, September 18th.

It remains to be seen whether the same logistics per pack will remain for the international set, but every card is likely to be a holo. However, we could see some cards lifted from the set to feature as promos, the same approach that is usually done for international releases compared to the Japanese version.

A slew of products are expected to be revealed, featuring the standard batch of Elite Trainer Boxes, Blister Packs, and more, while leaks have also shown that specific products featuring Umbreon and Espeon will be released in Japan.

What are you hoping to see in the Pokémon 30th Anniversary set? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For your next read, check out the details of how over 10% of all Pokémon cards ever printed were last year, and take a look at Amazon’s leak of the Winds and Waves price.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For May 29, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, May 29, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Animal
  • Hint 2: Small rodent
  • Hint 3: Common pet similar to a mouse or hamster

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Mouse
  • Cage
  • Lizard
  • Hedgehog
  • Rodent
  • Rabbit
  • Ferret
  • Chinchilla
  • Hamster

Today’s Contexto Answer For May 29, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Gerbil

A Gerbil is a small, furry rodent that has long back legs and a thin tail, and is often kept as a pet.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on May 30.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion
